component.name: Easy SCSModManager
component.summary: Mod and profile manager for Euro Truck Simulator 2 and American Truck Simulator

description.p: Easy SCSModManager is a Linux- and Windows-native tool for managing mods and profiles for Euro Truck Simulator 2 and American Truck Simulator. It looks like the in-game mod manager but adds the comfort features the game itself lacks.

ul.li: Grid of all installed mods with icons, full-text search and category filters
Drag & drop mods between installed and active, with multi-select
Switch between ETS2 and ATS from a single window
Active list grouped by load-order section with clear headers
Marks mods that sit in the wrong group
Compatibility check against the detected game version (incompatible mods flagged)
Conflict hints when two active mods touch the same files
Export and import a map combo to share or reproduce a map setup

screenshot.caption: The main window: mod grid on the left, the grouped active load order on the right

description.p: Initial release. Browse and activate mods for ETS2 and ATS, drag & drop load ordering with grouped sections, compatibility and conflict hints, map combo export/import, favourites, profile backup/restore, and a full English + German interface.
